case_title: CONSTRUCTION TESTING SERVICES, INC VS. RELIANCE BUILDING AND MAINTENANCE LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSTRUCTION TESTING SERVICES, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RELIANCE BUILDING AND MAINTENANCE LLC $3,815.84 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,935.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO STANISLAUS COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSTRUCTION TESTING SERVICES, INC AS TO DEFENDANT RELIANCE BUILDING AND MAINTENANCE LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONSTRUCTION TESTING SERVICES, INC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,793.75 FILED BY CONSTRUCTION TESTING SERVICES, INC AS TO DEFENDANT RELIANCE BUILDING AND MAINTENANCE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CONSTRUCTION TESTING SERVICES, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JASON ROEDER, CONTRACTS MANAGER. DEFENDANT RELIANCE BUILDING AND MAINTENANCE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2022 - JUDGMENT.
